subject: Gaming
title: No Russian: Art or Outrage
description: A fast breakdown of No Russian: Art or Outrage for builders.

hook.text: Call of Duty let players massacre civilians in an airport. 'No Russian' sparked a global debate about game content.

buildup.text: Modern Warfare 2's mission put players in the role of a terrorist. You could participate or just watch.

discovery.text: The mission was skippable. A warning appeared. But its existence alone generated outrage and media coverage.

twist.text: Infinity Ward said the scene served the narrative. Critics said it was shock value disguised as storytelling.

climax.text: The debate showed that games had reached a level of realism where content decisions carry real ethical weight.

punchline.text: Skip the mission or play it. Either way, the debate was unavoidable.

quiz.question: What option did players have for the 'No Russian' mission?
options: They could skip it entirely with a warning beforehand
They were forced to complete it
It was only available as DLC
